series_metadata.series_description: Records contain information received from insurance companies os sspicious fires with losses of $5000.00 or greater.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain microfilm records for four (4) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic records indefinitely. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until scanned into machine readable format and data is entered into computer system. Upon confirmation that imaged copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
